services.title: Practical roofing services for repairs, replacements and maintenance.
services.text: Choose from reliable roof repairs, new roofs, flat roofing, pitched roofing, slate and tile work, leadwork, guttering, chimney repairs and roof inspections.

featuredWork.title: Recent roofing jobs with practical before-and-after detail.

whyChoose.title: Roofing work should make the problem clearer, not more confusing.
whyChoose.text: Good roof work depends on what you see and what you do not: safe access, correct materials, neat junctions, reliable drainage and honest communication.

reviews.title: Clear advice, tidy sites and roofs ready for British weather.
reviews.text: Homeowners, landlords and small commercial clients choose clear communication, tidy workmanship and sensible roofing advice.

process.title: A clear process from first roof check to final handover.

faqs.title: Common questions before booking roofing work.
faqs.text: Get a feel for leaks, surveys, flat roofs, guttering, storm damage and how quotations are handled.
